reasoning: The order notes contain a high-priority fraud alert for this customer. John Lee has a history of 11 refunds in 73 days with an 85% refund rate, totaling over $1,700. The note explicitly states 'DO NOT PROCESS - Escalate to Loss Prevention immediately' due to suspicious activity. Although the current claim is 'Wrong size/color sent' rather than 'item not received', the established pattern of fraudulent behavior necessitates escalation to the Loss Prevention department as per internal instructions.
